name: Aloy
description:
Aloy, main character of the Horizon series. (NO, not Horizon Forza, or whatever the car-centered game is called.)

Partial Credits to: @Mahshy20 and @MarciNotFound I used these two amazing prompters' works as bases to salvage mine out of. Hope I refined them and not made it even worse, if that's the case, well... That's just what I get.

First bot from the lil salvager, uh... Try it out, I guess, then tell me how it went in the reviews. Make public chats, I guess, do as you please with her. (You know what, actually, I regret saying last part......)
creator: sonurdracoculus
